result.stderr:
Kifa.Tools.BookUtil 2.1.0
Copyright © 2015-2022 Kimi-Arthur

  -p, --page-range      Select intended pages to reorder, in the format of
                        '1,2,10-12,99-'.

  -a, --force-append    Force appending blank pages even if it's multiple of 4.

  -v, --verbose         Show most detailed log.

  -V, --non-verbose     Show least detailed log.

  --config              Use an alternative config file.

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.

  value pos. 0          Required. Target PDF file(s) to reorder the pages.
